reviews.comment:
Muy buena estación! La atención de los chicos (fuimos un par de veces) súper súper amables y piolas. Se encargan de todos una l dos personas por turno. Limpian, venden, cargan combustible, te ayudan con lo que necesites.. unos genios.
Los baños impecables. Tienen siempre combustible.
Lástima, que nos contaron, que desde que hicieron la nueva rn40 , que pasa por fuera, cerraron el full..

(Translated by Google)
Great station! The staff (we went a couple of times) were incredibly friendly and helpful. One or two people per shift handle everything. They clean, sell fuel, pump gas, and help you with anything you need—they're fantastic!
The restrooms are spotless. They always have fuel. It's a shame, though, that since they built the new RN40 highway, which runs right by the station, they've closed the full-service area.

reviewReply.comment:
Buenas noches Rivarola muchas gracias por su visita estamos trabajando para brindar un mejor servicio cada día más.. saludos cordiales.
Atte Patricio

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12873177461588192703/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNYa3FYay1nRRAB

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) We arrived in Hualfin and went straight to the rest stop to sleep. It's not open 24 hours, but it closes at 10 PM and opens at 6 AM. Clean bathrooms, no showers. Quiet place to spend the night; some truckers and motorhomes stay there overnight. It has a small convenience store that sells water and soft drinks.

(Original)
Chegamos em Hualfin direto no posto para dormir. Não é 24h, mas fecha às 22h e abre às 6h. Banheiros limpos, não tem ducha (banho). Lugar calmo para passar a noite, alguns caminhoneiros e motorhomes ficam no local a noite. Possui uma mini loja de conveniência que vende água e refrigerantes.

reviewReply.comment: Muchas gracias por su visita Lucia. Estamos trabajando para brindar un mejor servicio, la estación cierra a las 22 horas. Saludos cordiales ñ.

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12873177461588192703/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURueF83YUpBEAE

reviews.comment:
Como socia ne enorgullece encontrar el ACA en distintos puntos del país. Muy buen servicio. Nos atendió Victor. Muy amable y eficiente. La,sede impecable.

(Translated by Google)
As a member, I'm proud to find ACA branches in different parts of the country. Excellent service. Victor helped us. Very friendly and efficient. The branch was spotless.

reviewReply.comment:
Buen día Alejandra muchas gracias por su visita. Estamos trabajando para brindar lo mejor para nuestros clientes, saludos cordiales.
Atte Patricio.
